---
title: ""
format:
  html:
    title-block: false
---

::: {.section-page}

# Physics-Based Simulation

This section highlights focused technical work in numerical modeling, simulation workflows, and validation.

<div class="project-list">
<!-- future 3.1, 3.2, 3.3 rows -->

<div class="project-item">
<a class="project-link" href="physics-based-simulation/simulating-wec-arrays-in-wamit.qmd">
<div class="project-number">3.1</div>
<div class="project-text">
<div class="project-title">Simulating Wave Energy Converter Arrays in WAMIT</div>
<div class="project-tags">
<span class="project-tag">hydrodynamic simulation</span>
<span class="project-tag">WAMIT</span>
<span class="project-tag">wave energy</span>
<span class="project-tag">array interactions</span>
<span class="project-tag">frequency-domain modeling</span>
<span class="project-tag">ocean engineering</span>
</div>
</div>
</a>
</div>

<div class="project-divider"></div>

</div>

:::
